title: AppEvent boundary comment misstates motivation
description: The comment says 'AppState can operate without jmap_chat type dependencies on its internal data structures' — but AppState already has Vec<Chat>, Vec<Message> fields which ARE jmap_chat types. A future reader will be confused by the contradiction. Fix: 'so that HashMap-keyed lookups (typing_indicators, presence) work without Id→String conversions at every HashSet/HashMap access point.'
close_reason: Fixed: boundary comment now explains the HashMap Borrow constraint as the actual motivation.
